name: vdm
description: SDLC workflow plugins: docs-sync (documentation synchronization), docs-distill (synthesis layer — the summary view that is rebuilt, not appended to; drift signal on `covers:` frontmatter), learn (knowledge capture), changelog (project change tracking), crystal-* (workitem discipline gate — grow/bud/cut/cave + migrate for batch legacy-doc onboarding), intercom (central cross-agent/cross-session message store).
